subcodes.first_line: Verily, the heaven of bounty hath willed to send unto thee a star from among the stars of divine knowledge from the direction of the Name, the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان سماء العطاء ارادت ان ترسل الیک نجما من انجم العرفان من شطر اسمها الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
